# Guest Experience Evidence

SMOKE SAMPLE evidence for local verification only. Replace before operational use.

## Period

- Reporting period: 2026-06-17 to 2026-06-23
- Primary channels reviewed: post-stay survey, OTA reviews, front desk recovery log.

## Complaint Signals

- Top complaint themes: breakfast queue time, elevator wait time, slow invoice correction.
- Locations or departments involved: F&B breakfast outlet, Engineering, Front Office.
- Repeat issues: 14 survey mentions of breakfast waits over 12 minutes.

## Positive Signals

- Strong review themes: clean rooms and evening front desk assistance.
- Team or service highlights: night manager recovered two late-arrival complaints.

## Service Recovery

- Cases requiring follow-up: 3 invoice correction cases older than 48 hours.
- Owner: Front Office Manager.
- Deadline: 2026-06-25.

## Evidence Notes

- Source file or system: sample guest feedback summary.
- Data owner: Quality Manager.
- Open questions: verify whether queue staffing changed during the weekend peak.
